citations.content: Date: 5/15/25 appearing after 'Donor Signature: (Or Donor Rep.) <signature>'

parentBlock.content:
My or my donor representative's signature below represents I understand what I have read/had explained and give Cardinal Biologicals, Inc.
informed consent to donate my birth tissues, (for the above-mentioned uses), obtain blood and information from my physician and hospital
in the birth donation process to determine the medical eligibility and acceptability of my donated birth tissue including:
1. Any medical information (pertaining to this donation), including hospital records, prenatal screening records, laboratory testing,
delivery records and any other information covered in the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA).
2. A completed Medical Social History interview/(Donor Risk Assessment Interview "DRAI") as well as provide blood samples for eligibility
screening. Confirmed positive test results will be reported to my physician and to appropriate
health officials as required by law.
3. Neither coercion nor inaccurate information has been used in any manner to obtain my informed consent. I am not currently under the
influence of any drugs or anesthesia; I understand what I have read or had explained to me and
I have been given the opportunity to ask questions as it relates to the donation of my birth tissue.
4. My or my donor representative's contact information will be used by Cardinal Biologicals, Inc. to reach me in the
event eligibility information is missing or needed further clarification. (Donor representatives fill out the following if necessary):
Donor Rep. Name: N/A
Address: N/A
Phone: N/A
Relationship: N/A
5. Cardinal Biologicals, Inc. may be present in the hospital, to recover/acquire/receive the birth tissue.
I am consenting to the collection of: CHECK ALL THAT APPLY
[ ] All
[x] Whole Placenta
[ ] Umbilical Cord Blood
[ ] Amniotic Fluid
[x] Foreskin
Donor Signature: (Or Donor Rep.) <signature>
Date: 5/15/25
Witness Name: Katherine Matthews
Witness Signature: <signature>
Date: 5/12/25
